brief.speaker: grayson
brief.text: How many distinct occupations does this borough support? Investors love that number. Diversity of labor, they call it. Count the unique occupations.

hints.text: Grayson: 'Close, but you're including NULLs or duplicates. DISTINCT. The word is DISTINCT.'
Grayson: 'Distinct occupations. Not all three-thousand rows.'

success.speaker: grayson
success.text: Twenty-five distinct trades. Impressive number for a pitch. Put it in the deck.
